videos.title: Top 10 Things To Do In Ghana | Detty December & Beyond
videos.description:
Planning a trip to Ghana? In this video, I’m sharing the top 10 things to do in Ghana—from vibrant city life in Accra to breathtaking natural wonders and rich cultural experiences. December is an incredible time to visit with festivals, nightlife, and perfect weather, but honestly, Ghana is amazing year-round! Whether it’s your first time or you’re returning, this guide will help you make the most of your trip. Let’s explore Ghana!

Resources
========================
Get my Ghana guide: https://travelwithkemoy.com/top-things-to-do-in-ghana-for-detty-december-your-ultimate-guide-to-an-unforgettable-celebration/

videos.title: ACCRA:  Discovering Ghana's Fascinating Capital City (Full Travel Guide) | West Africa #ghana #accra
videos.description:
Get 10% off your first month of therapy with BetterHelp (the paid partner of today's video) using my exclusive link:  https://betterhelp.com/DrifterDave

Imagine a place where history, culture, and modernity collide to create one of West Africa's most vibrant major cities.  In this video, join me as I explore and discover the fascinating capital city of Accra, Ghana.  This former British colony on the Gold Coast of West Africa is one of the continent's most bustling metropolises.  

I begin my exploration of the capital with a visit to its iconic Black Star Square, home to the most famous landmark in the city, the Independence Arch.  From there, I head to historic Jamestown, the oldest part of Accra and the original site of European colonization in the area.  Today, this raucous neighbourhood isn't exactly safe (make sure you bring a guide!) but what it lacks in safety it makes up for with some incredible historic sites, including the Jamestown Lighthouse, the Usshar Fort, and its chaotic and colourful fishing harbour. After checking out the city's historic colonial history, I head to the Jamestown Coffee Company to sample some of the finest coffee in all of Africa (highly recommended!).

After exploring Accra's top sights, I continue my journey east towards the Nigeria border, heading to the Aflao Bus Terminal to catch a Ford Transit headed for the Togo border.  Three hours later, I arrive in the capital city of Lome, where I'll pick up from in the next video.

Which of Accra's attractions would you most want to visit?  Let me know in the comments below!

00:00 Intro 
01:06 Breakfast at Frankie's
02:45 Black Star Square
04:18 Jamestown Lighthouse
06:08 Ussher Fort
06:58 Jamestown Fishing Harbour
07:50 Osikan Beach
11:10 Jamestown Coffee Company
13:48 The Countdown is on...
14:12 Uber to Aflao Station
15:11 Accra to Togo Border
18:15 Crossing into Lome, Togo
18:51 Outro

Episode 236 | #Africa #WestAfrica #Ghana | #Accra | Filmed April 2024

SUBSCRIBE to my YouTube Channel to stay up to date with my travels (click the bell for notifications!) and be sure to hit that LIKE button if you enjoyed this video!
